name: agent-rbac
description: Adaptive RBAC, audit, and trust copilot for OpenClaw agents

permissionsConfigPath.label: Permissions Config Path
permissionsConfigPath.help: Absolute or ~-relative path to the permission config JSON.

stateDir.label: State Directory
stateDir.help: Directory for audit, adaptive, and memory state.

promptGuard.label: Prompt Guard
promptGuard.help: Inject refusal or boundary guidance before model prompt build.

toolGuard.label: Tool Guard
toolGuard.help: Evaluate tool calls before execution and block denied calls.

gatewayMethods.label: Gateway Methods
gatewayMethods.help: Expose audit, evaluate, and smoke-test gateway methods.
